name: Hobonichi Co., Ltd.
summary: Hobonichi Co., Ltd. engages in the operation, content production, and sale of Hobonichi Itoi Shimbun newspaper in Japan. The company also operates stores and event spaces under the TOBICHI, Hobonichi Culture, and Hobonichi name; and Dokonoko, an SNS application, which is used to post pictures of dogs, cats, etc., as well as offers other books and products. Hobonichi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
